identity.name: @epdoc/text
identity.purpose: Standalone string manipulation utilities and template substitution (msub)

quickStart.pattern: Import text utilities or msub for string manipulation and substitution

exports.name: wrap
exports.description: Wrap text into lines of a maximum width

exports.name: pluralize
exports.description: Return plural or singular form based on a count

exports.name: padLeft
exports.description: Left-pad a string to a target length
exports.whenToUse: Aligning text in columns or fixed-width fields

exports.name: msub.replace
exports.description: Replace ${key} placeholders in a string using the singleton
exports.whenToUse: Simple template substitution without custom configuration

exports.name: msub.create
exports.description: Create an isolated, configurable MSub instance
exports.whenToUse: When you need custom delimiters separate from the global singleton

exports.name: createTable
exports.description: Format an array of strings into aligned columns
exports.whenToUse: Displaying lists in a compact tabular layout

patterns.name: Text utilities
patterns.when: Padding, wrapping, pluralizing, or encoding strings

patterns.name: Simple substitution
patterns.when: Replacing ${key} placeholders using the global singleton
patterns.code:
import { msub } from '@epdoc/text';
const out = msub.replace('Hello, ${name}!', { name: 'World' });

patterns.name: Custom substitution instance
patterns.when: Needing different delimiters or isolated configuration
